lines.english: Why is the rescue taking so long?
lines.chinese: 为什么救援用了这么长时间？
lines.raw: Why is the rescue taking so long? | 为什么救援用了这么长时间？

lines.english: Six men have been trapped in a mine for seventeen hours.
lines.chinese: 六名男子被困在矿井里已经十七个小时了。
lines.raw: Six men have been trapped in a mine for seventeen hours. | 六名男子被困在矿井里已经十七个小时了。

lines.english: If they are not brought to the surface soon they may lose their lives.
lines.chinese: 如果他们不尽快被带到地面，他们可能会失去生命。
lines.raw: If they are not brought to the surface soon they may lose their lives. | 如果他们不尽快被带到地面，他们可能会失去生命。

lines.english: However, rescue operations are proving difficult.
lines.chinese: 然而，救援行动进展困难。
lines.raw: However, rescue operations are proving difficult. | 然而，救援行动进展困难。

lines.english: If explosives are used, vibrations will cause the roof of the mine to collapse.
lines.chinese: 如果使用炸药，震动将导致矿井顶部坍塌。
lines.raw: If explosives are used, vibrations will cause the roof of the mine to collapse. | 如果使用炸药，震动将导致矿井顶部坍塌。

lines.english: Rescue workers are therefore drilling a hole on the north side of the mine.
lines.chinese: 因此，救援人员正在矿井北侧钻一个洞。
lines.raw: Rescue workers are therefore drilling a hole on the north side of the mine. | 因此，救援人员正在矿井北侧钻一个洞。

lines.english: They intend to bring the men up in a special capsule.
lines.chinese: 他们打算用一个特殊的胶囊将这些人带上来。
lines.raw: They intend to bring the men up in a special capsule. | 他们打算用一个特殊的胶囊将这些人带上来。

lines.english: If there had not been a hard layer of rock beneath the soil,
lines.chinese: 如果土壤下面没有一层坚硬的岩石，
lines.raw: If there had not been a hard layer of rock beneath the soil, | 如果土壤下面没有一层坚硬的岩石，

lines.english: they would have completed the job in a few hours.
lines.chinese: 他们几个小时就能完成这项工作。
lines.raw: they would have completed the job in a few hours. | 他们几个小时就能完成这项工作。

lines.english: As it is, they have been drilling for 16 hours and they still have a long way to go.
lines.chinese: 事实上，他们已经钻了16个小时，还有很长的路要走。
lines.raw: As it is, they have been drilling for 16 hours and they still have a long way to go. | 事实上，他们已经钻了16个小时，还有很长的路要走。

lines.english: Meanwhile, a microphone, which was lowered into the mine two hours ago,
lines.chinese: 同时，两个小时前被放入矿井的麦克风，
lines.raw: Meanwhile, a microphone, which was lowered into the mine two hours ago, | 同时，两个小时前被放入矿井的麦克风，

lines.english: has enabled the men to keep in touch with their closest relatives.
lines.chinese: 使这些男子能够与他们最亲近的亲属保持联系。
lines.raw: has enabled the men to keep in touch with their closest relatives. | 使这些男子能够与他们最亲近的亲属保持联系。

lines.english: Though they are running out of food and drink,
lines.chinese: 尽管他们的食物和饮用水即将耗尽，
lines.raw: Though they are running out of food and drink, | 尽管他们的食物和饮用水即将耗尽，

lines.english: the men are cheerful and confident that they will get out soon.
lines.chinese: 这些男子仍然很乐观，并相信他们很快就能出来。
lines.raw: the men are cheerful and confident that they will get out soon. | 这些男子仍然很乐观，并相信他们很快就能出来。

lines.english: They have been told that rescue operations are progressing smoothly.
lines.chinese: 他们被告知救援行动进展顺利。
lines.raw: They have been told that rescue operations are progressing smoothly. | 他们被告知救援行动进展顺利。

lines.english: If they knew how difficult it was to drill through the hard rock, they would lose heart.
lines.chinese: 如果他们知道钻穿坚硬的岩石有多困难，他们就会灰心丧气。
lines.raw: If they knew how difficult it was to drill through the hard rock, they would lose heart. | 如果他们知道钻穿坚硬的岩石有多困难，他们就会灰心丧气。
